stemHtml:
Using the information below, what is the Allowed Take-Off Mass?

Maximum Structural Take-Off Mass (MSTOM): 232 000 kg
Maximum Structural Landing Mass (MSLM): 182 000 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass (MZFM): 169 000 kg
Performance-Limited Take-Off Mass (PLTOM): 232 600 kg
Performance-Limited Landing Mass (PLLM): 179 200 kg
Trip Fuel: 52 000 kg
Start and Taxi Fuel: 300 kg
Reserve Fuel (Contingency + Final + Alternate): 8800 kg
Extra Fuel: 1000 kg due to anticipated holding at the destination
No discretionary fuel is planned
